title: Disk quota → warning at 90%, block at 100%
evidence: All 4 TC-009 tests passed in 1800ms (317/317 total tests across 45 test files): - ✓ TC-009: at 90% usage — DISK_QUOTA_WARNING audit event written + Slack DM sent (conversations.open + chat.postMessage with `rm -rf` cleanup suggestion) - ✓ TC-009: at 100% usage — DISK_QUOTA_EXCEEDED audit event written + disk_quota_exceeded=1 in DB - ✓ TC-009: POST /v1/tenants/:id/message returns 507 (body: `{ok:false, error:'Disk quota exceeded'}`) while disk_quota_exceeded=1 - ✓ TC-009: below 95% — disk_quota_exceeded auto-cleared to 0, no new audit events written
